body_txt: Yet another way to quickly and simply add another visual quirk to a character without necessarily implying anything about their personality. Sometimes—not always—multiple strands of hair antennae will be treated as an exaggeration of the Idiot Hair (which normally is when the character has only one strand), in which case the Hair Antennae probably will belong to someone... lighter in disposition or general intellect . Not to be confused with Devilish Hair Horns , which is a more villainous permutation.
